Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

Alex, it's sometimes hard to know if your patches are intended for landing, or if they are only for testing, especially since you have a lot of patches.

You need to be more active in asking for patch reviews and pinging reviewers if they don't review them (e.g. after a week or so).  

Otherwise, I think your very useful patches are often reviewed only by me.  Sometimes I also miss them, or they sit with a single review and they don't get landed for a long time, which also causes you extra work to refresh them.

Patch Set 6:

Alexandre, please review

(2 comments)
